channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Atoms observed spinning backward in quantum experiment
item.description: Scientists tracked angular momentum through a crystal for the first time and discovered an unexpected reversal.

item.title: AI body map reveals obesity's hidden impact on facial nerves
item.description: An AI system that maps mouse bodies in detail has uncovered a surprising effect of obesity on facial nerves.

item.title: Researchers identify optimal temperature for extending mango freshness
item.description: Storing mangoes at 54°F significantly slows ripening, keeping the fruit fresh much longer than at typical tropical temperatures.

item.title: NASA puzzled by solar radio burst lasting 19 days
item.description: A strange radio signal from the Sun persisted for 19 days, far longer than typical solar radio bursts, surprising NASA scientists.
